message:
✨ Add cluster deployment option to from-lens page and Helm ingress template (#2321)

* ✨ Add cluster deployment option to from-lens page and Helm ingress template

The from-lens page now offers two clearly delineated deployment paths:
- Localhost (port-forward) for quick evaluation
- Cluster (ingress/route) for production team access with kc-agent setup

Also adds the missing Ingress template to the Helm chart so
--set ingress.enabled=true actually creates the Ingress resource.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Three deployment tabs: Localhost (brew), Cluster (port-forward), Cluster (ingress)

- Localhost tab: brew install + kc-agent (default tab)
- Cluster port-forward tab: Helm install + kubectl port-forward
- Cluster ingress tab: Helm with --set ingress.enabled=true + kc-agent with CORS
- Post-install callout for cluster tabs: TLS, OAuth, and CORS guidance

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
